title: Mace_PVP Traning Bot
description: This mod provides the player to train their mace
body:
Overview

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Zye9YxMa?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/Zye9YxMa)
[![Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/Zye9YxMa)](https://modrinth.com/mod/Zye9YxMa/versions)


Mace PVB is a single-player Fabric mod that adds a fully controllable Mace PvP training bot. The bot behaves like a real player and supports Wind Charge combat and Elytra-based aerial PvP.

All logic runs locally in single-player worlds using Carpet fake players and tick-based control.

Requirements / Dependencies Required

Minecraft: 1.21.11

Fabric Loader: 0.18.4 or newer

Fabric API: Latest compatible version

Carpet Mod: Required (for fake player control)

Java: Java 21

Notes

Single-player only

No server required

Compatible with most Fabric optimization mods

Commands to control

use 
/macebot windp to summon the bot use 
/macebot pause to stop it use 
/macebot resume to continew
